response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems-level aptitude, but no evidence of optimizing routing tiles, real-time traffic integration, or fault-tolerant geospatial data systems at scale.
strengths: Built and maintained a production-grade open-source GIS platform used by NGOs
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Strong systems thinking evidenced by low-latency DLang apps and Kubernetes deployment experience
concerns: No demonstrated professional experience with C++ or Rust in routing or navigation contexts
Lacks explicit experience with routing tiling, map data optimization, or global navigation pipelines
Geospatial work is primarily web-based and open-source, not production routing data systems at scale
